name: ppopp-skills
description: Depth pack for PPoPP parallel-programming submissions: venue routing, the two-column acmart sigplan 10-page format, double-blind HotCRP submission with rebuttal, concurrency-correctness and parallel-performance evidence, and the CGO-shared ACM artifact-evaluation badges.

plugins.name: ppopp-skills
plugins.description: Twelve PPoPP-specific skills for the ACM SIGPLAN Symposium on Principles and Practice of Parallel Programming, grounded in the PPoPP 2026/2027 researchr calls, sigplan.org announcements, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
